name: codex-memos-evolve
description: Reflect2Evolve-style Codex memory plugin backed by usememos/memos.

interface.shortDescription: Turn Codex task traces into reusable policies and skills stored in Memos.
interface.longDescription: Codex Memos Evolve gives Codex a Memos-backed memory loop inspired by Reflect2Evolve: recall compact guidance before work, record task traces, promote repeated lessons into policies, and crystallize stable policies into reusable skills.
defaultPrompt: Before non-trivial Codex work, call memos_evolve_recall for relevant memory.
After reusable work, call memos_evolve_record_trace with durable lessons.
Use memos_evolve_maintain to preview or apply cleanup when memory is growing.
Use memos_evolve_stats to verify the memory plugin is connected.
